fields.label: Application (Client) ID
fields.helpText: From Azure Portal -> App registrations -> your app -> Overview

fields.label: Client Secret
fields.helpText: From Azure Portal -> App registrations -> your app -> Certificates & secrets

fields.label: Directory (Tenant) ID
fields.helpText: From Azure Portal -> Azure Active Directory -> Overview

fields.label: Subscription ID
fields.helpText: From Azure Portal -> Subscriptions -> select your subscription

healthcheck_config.description: Validates Azure credentials by querying subscription metadata

metadata.summary: Microsoft Azure access for compute, billing, storage, and other Azure services.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to Azure Portal (portal.azure.com).
2. Navigate to Azure Active Directory -> App registrations -> New registration.
3. Give the app a name and register it.
4. Copy the Application (client) ID and Directory (tenant) ID from the Overview page.
5. Go to Certificates & secrets -> New client secret -> copy the secret value.
6. Go to Subscriptions -> select your subscription -> copy the Subscription ID.
7. Assign the app a role on the subscription (e.g., Cost Management Reader for billing).
